summary: Derle RC quality round — all 11 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend flows verified. AI organize splits text into 5+ notes, non-blocking add works, priority grouping by category works, settings compact with TR/EN pills + theme toggle confirmed.

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver web warning (expected behavior in Expo web preview, not a real bug)

context_for_next_testing_agent: RC round complete. All tested features: (1) AI organize splits 'süt al kahve al annemi ara' into 3 separate notes in correct categories (Alışveriş, Kişisel) — 4 priority groups visible after full sentence. (2) Non-blocking add: input cleared instantly, local save shown immediately, AI upgrades in background ~7s. (3) Organize screen: category groups with collapse/expand working. (4) Checkbox (note-check-{id}) and pin (note-pin-{id}) buttons work. (5) Settings: TR/EN pill toggle working, SegmentedControl for theme (System/Light/Dark) with testID theme-{value}, dark theme applies site-wide, haptics Switch toggle present. (6) Backend: /api/ returns {ok:true, service:derle, ai_configured:true}, /api/ai/organize returns 5+ items for long Turkish sentence.
